message:
style(e2e): complete privacy test logging standardization

Continues standardization of privacy test logging to use consistent
[E2E-PRIVACY] prefix format throughout the test file.

Additional changes:
- session_spawned log uses printf formatting
- checkpoint_attempt uses LogJSON helper
- Warning messages prefixed consistently
- privacy_block_confirmed and test_completed prefixed

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
